channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump criticizes former aide involved in efforts to secure Pentagon funding amid Iran war
item.description: President Donald Trump has publicly criticized Robert Karem, a former Defense Department official and current senior aide to Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell, despite Karem advocating for addi...

item.title: Toronto Rock take Game 1 victory over Halifax Thunderbirds in NLL Finals
item.description: The Halifax Thunderbirds fell short in the first game of the National Lacrosse League (NLL) Finals, losing to the Toronto Rock. The match, which took place in Halifax, saw the Rock assert strong offen...

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 Italian Passions Car Pack: contents and release details
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 players with the Premium Edition or those who purchase the add-on separately will soon receive the Italian Passions Car Pack. This pack features four Italian vehicles: the 2025 Ferrari...

item.title: Government approves blue passports for high-paying taxpayers and plans modernisation of passport services
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Authorities in Pakistan have approved blue passports for 42 top taxpayers who have been designated as ambassadors at large, following directives from the Prime Minister. Most of these passp...

item.title: Rescue operation saves four hikers stranded in snowy conditions on North Shore Mountain
item.description: On May 17, 2026, four hikers found themselves stranded on a North Shore mountain due to unexpected snowy conditions. Local emergency services were quickly alerted after the hikers encountered difficul...

item.title: Rev. Franklin Graham criticizes moral state of America at Trump event
item.description: During President Donald Trump's 'Rededicate 250' prayer event at the National Mall, Rev. Franklin Graham, son of the late evangelist Billy Graham, delivered a pre-recorded speech describing America as...

item.title: Debate over raising Pakistan’s voting age to 25 sparks widespread criticism
item.description: A proposal suggested by an aide to the Prime Minister to increase the minimum voting age from 18 to 25 has met with strong opposition from political parties and civil society in Pakistan. Rana Sanaull...

item.title: Two Teenagers Arrested Following Series of Shootings in Austin, Texas
item.description: Police in Austin, Texas, have arrested two teenagers in connection with a series of at least ten shootings that occurred over a weekend. The incidents, which also involved robberies and stolen vehicle...

item.title: Catherine O’Hara: Career Highlights and Iconic Moments in the 1980s
item.description: Catherine Anne O’Hara (March 4, 1954 – January 30, 2026) was a celebrated Canadian and American actress, comedian, and screenwriter whose career spanned over five decades. She rose to fame on the sket...

item.title: Verstappen retires from Nürburgring 24 Hours after mechanical failure
item.description: Max Verstappen, the four-time Formula One world champion, saw his debut at the Nürburgring 24 Hours cut short due to a driveshaft failure. Sharing a Mercedes-AMG GT3 with Dani Juncadella, Jules Gounon...

item.title: Pakistan Engages Diplomatically to Mediate US-Iran Tensions
item.description: Over the weekend, Pakistan continued its active diplomatic role to ease tensions in the Middle East, particularly between the US and Iran. Federal Minister Naqvi visited Tehran for a two-day trip, mee...

item.title: Lauren Jbara and Daniel Lockhart: Life Together After Baseball
item.description: Daniel Lockhart, aged 34 as of 2026, is the husband of Kenyan-based sports broadcaster Lauren Jbara. Born in Nashville, Tennessee, Daniel grew up in a baseball family; his father, Keith Lockhart, had ...

item.title: Brain Activity After Exercise Plays a Key Role in Building Endurance
item.description: New research published in the journal Neuron reveals that the benefits of exercise extend beyond muscles and into the brain. Scientists at the University of Pennsylvania discovered that certain nerve ...

item.title: South Africa's Future Beyond the ANC: Preserving the 1994 Democratic Vision
item.description: South Africa is at a critical juncture as the African National Congress (ANC) continues its decline, sparking concerns about the stability of the post-1994 democratic settlement. Political economist N...

item.title: India reports no new Ebola cases since 2014, health authorities remain vigilant
item.description: In the wake of the World Health Organization declaring the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda as a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC), Indian health experts have reassured the pu...

item.title: Government outlines plans for earlier intervention and parental accountability to reduce youth crime
item.description: The UK government has unveiled a series of measures aimed at tackling youth crime in England and Wales, as detailed in a new Youth Justice White Paper. Deputy Prime Minister David Lammy emphasised the...

item.title: Library of Congress Adds 'Doom' Soundtrack to National Recording Registry
item.description: The Library of Congress has officially added the soundtrack for the iconic 1993 video game 'Doom' to its National Recording Registry, preserving it as an important cultural and musical artifact. Compo...

item.title: Ukraine launches major drone strike on Moscow, causing fatalities and infrastructure damage
item.description: Ukraine has carried out its largest drone attack on Moscow in over a year, resulting in at least four deaths, including three in the Moscow region and one in the Belgorod region near the Ukrainian bor...

item.title: Expert Warns of Potential Challenges to Midterm Elections Amid Trump's Statements
item.description: President Donald Trump has raised concerns about the integrity of the upcoming 2026 midterm elections, prompting warnings from experts and voting rights advocates. Trump recently stated that he would ...

item.title: Canadian cruise passenger in B.C. tests positive for hantavirus, contacts monitored
item.description: Canada's Public Health Agency (PHAC) has confirmed that a Canadian passenger who recently disembarked from a cruise ship affected by a deadly outbreak has tested positive for hantavirus while isolatin...
